recommendations.title: EVA
recommendations.overview: In 2041, humans live side-by-side with robots and androids. A well-known cybernetic engineer, Alex Garel, returns to his hometown to create a new model of robot child.

recommendations.title: The Whispering Star
recommendations.overview: A feminine android delivers packages to scattered humans throughout the galaxy. With years to spare, the android and us have time to contemplate the meaning of being human.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: The History of Trunks

recommendations.title: Westworld

recommendations.title: WALL·E
recommendations.overview: After hundreds of years doing what he was built for, WALL•E— a robot designed to clean up the earth—discovers a new purpose in life when he meets a sleek search robot named EVE. EVE comes to realize that WALL•E has inadvertently stumbled upon the key

recommendations.title: Pokémon 4Ever
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family

recommendations.title: Smash and Grab
recommendations.overview: After years of toiling away inside the engine room of a towering locomotive, two antiquated robots will risk everything for freedom and for each other.

recommendations.title: Mars Express
